creator: ade@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Please send the output of: 

make showconfig 
make configure 

This issue is only occuring on FreeBSD 6.x (not 7 or 8) which is slated 
for EOL in a few months time.  I may be able to generate a short term 
hack, but it may just be simpler not to attempt to upgrade the port.
